meta.title: Cyber Security And Its Impacts On Small Utilities
meta.description:
Emma Stewart begins with the difficult question of what a small electric utility would / should spend an extra $100K at the end of the year. There are many choices, cybersecurity just being one. In the first half Emma discusses the current situation:

- the challenges small utilities face with cybersecurity
- shifting responsibility but not shifting blame
- what went right and wrong in the 100-day sprint for electric sector cybersecurity
- how DER are new security and regulation problems

In the second half Emma gives some solutions and directions for progress (and some stories that those in the electric sector will enjoy).
